---
title: "[Title: Regulatory Delta — Pending LaTeX conversion]"
author:
  - name: Lalitha A R
    affiliation: iSRL
    orcid: 0009-0001-7466-3531
    email: lalithaar.research@gmail.com
    corresponding: true
x-contributor:
  - name: Hitha
    role: Typesetting
doc-id: iSRL-26-02-R-RegDelta
date: February 2026
doi: 10.5281/zenodo.18719394
license: "CC BY"
citation:
  type: report
  publisher: iSRL
  number: iSRL-26-02-R-RegDelta
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
bibliography: references.bib
draft: true
draft-mode: visible
---

<!-- TODO: Paste LaTeX-converted content here. See TYPESETTING-SOP.md Section 5 for conversion guide. -->
